REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1342 York Street)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Trustee.

The sale was confirmed at $590,000.00 to Patrick Gutteridge based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 30, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (522 Lisbon S.F.)
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Andrea Leung.

The sale was confirmed at $275,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Recognizing Andrea Leung As Successor Trustee Of Trust; For Order Bringing Trust Under Continuing Court Supervision; And Fixing Tru
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Ex Parte Petition For Order Recognizing Andrea Leung As Temporary Successor Trustee Of Trust; For Order Bringing Trust Under Continuing Court Supervision; And Fixing Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 290581. Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with Reynaldo Urrutia. Lawrence Syracusa for and with Anna Leung. Katia Jaen (Friend/Interpreter).

Mr. Peterson reported that the Proposed Conservatee did not like Ms. Leung. Mr. Syracusa reported that Mr. Urrutia needed help. Mr. Peterson agreed with Mr. Syracusa. The Court appointed Ms. Leung as the Temporary Conservator of the Person and Estate and temporary trustee of the Trust of Reynaldo Urrutia which expires on December 12, 2007. The bond in the Conservatorship is set at $10,000.00. The bond in the Trust is set at $200,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.
